title: Coordinate Converter
description: Convert live between Decimal Degrees, DMS, UTM, MGRS and Geohash, with an interactive map. Click or drag the marker to set a location.

title: GeoJSON Viewer & Editor
description: Paste, drop or load GeoJSON, see it on a map, click features to edit their properties, validate, and re-export.

title: Bounding Box Picker
description: Draw or type a geographic bounding box and copy it in the five formats APIs want — CSV, WKT, GeoJSON, Leaflet and Overpass.

title: Static Map Generator
description: Compose a map view with pins, then export a ready-to-use PNG image or an OpenStreetMap embed snippet. No API keys.

title: Batch Geocoder
description: Paste a list of addresses or place names and get coordinates for all of them — on a map and as CSV or GeoJSON.

title: Spatial Data Scraper
description: Extract locations from a URL or pasted page text — addresses, cities, landmarks — geocode them, preview on a map, and export JSON, CSV or GeoJSON.

title: Sun Calculator
description: Sunrise, sunset, twilight and golden hour for any place and date, with a sun-path chart. NOAA-accurate math, no libraries.

title: Weather
description: Current conditions, a 24-hour strip with sparkline, a 7-day forecast and a live precipitation radar for any place — offline caching, °C/°F toggle.

title: Moon Calculator
description: Moonrise, moonset, phase and illumination for any place and date, with a live moon disc and a month of phases at a glance.

title: Elevation Profiler
description: Draw a route on the map and see the terrain profile under it — distance, climb, descent and steepest grade.

title: Radius & Buffer Tool
description: Drop a pin and draw accurate distance rings around it — true geodesic circles, not flat-map approximations — then export GeoJSON.

title: Flight Route Plotter
description: Build a multi-leg route between airports and cities, see true great-circle paths with distances and flight times.

title: Photo Location Viewer
description: See where your photos were taken from their hidden EXIF GPS data, map them, and save clean copies with the metadata stripped.

title: Map Projection Explorer
description: See the world in 19 map projections, visualize distortion with Tissot's indicatrix, and compare Mercator vs Gall-Peters side by side.

title: GeoJSON Diff Viewer
description: Compare two GeoJSON files — added, removed and changed features matched by ID or geometry, shown on a map and in a detail list.

title: Choropleth Map Builder
description: Paste CSV data keyed by US state or country, fuzzy-match it to real geography, and get a colored choropleth map with a legend — export SVG or PNG.

title: Quick Chart Maker
description: Type or paste data and export a chart — bar, line, pie, doughnut or scatter. Edit as a table or raw CSV/TSV, then download a PNG.

title: CSV Explorer
description: Open a CSV without a spreadsheet: sort, filter, per-column stats and histograms — then clean it up and re-export.

title: CSV ↔ JSON Converter
description: Convert between CSV and JSON in either direction with live preview, delimiter auto-detect, type detection and nested-JSON flattening.

title: Data Generator
description: Set up your columns and generate realistic fake data — names, emails, dates, prices and more — then export as CSV or JSON. Same seed = same data every time.

title: Regex Tester & Extractor
description: Write a regex, see live match highlighting and a capture-group table, then replace or extract — with a built-in cheatsheet and example patterns.

title: JSON Tree Explorer
description: Paste JSON and explore it as a collapsible tree — search keys and values, copy any path, and pluck values out of arrays of objects.

title: Pivot Table Explorer
description: Load a CSV and drag or click fields into Rows, Columns, Values and Filters for a live pivot table — nested groups, subtotals, a quick chart.

title: Data Anonymizer
description: Mask or fake-replace sensitive CSV columns — shuffle, hash, redact, add noise — with reproducible seeding and a k-anonymity check.

title: Color Palette Generator
description: Generate palettes with harmony rules, lock and edit swatches, extract colors from an image, check WCAG contrast and color-blind safety.

title: CSS Playground
description: Visually build gradients, layered shadows and border-radius blobs, then copy production-ready CSS.

title: Image Converter & Resizer
description: Convert, resize and compress images right in your browser — nothing is uploaded, and private EXIF data is stripped along the way.

title: QR Code Generator
description: Make QR codes for links, Wi-Fi, email, phone or text with custom colors and sizes; download as PNG or SVG.

title: Markdown Previewer
description: Write Markdown with a live side-by-side preview and export clean HTML — drafts autosave as you type.

title: Favicon Generator
description: Make a complete favicon set from an emoji, letters or an image — real multi-size .ico, all the PNGs, manifest and HTML tags.

title: Flag Designer Studio
description: Design a flag from real vexillological building blocks and get live feedback against NAVA's "good flag" principles. Export SVG or PNG.

title: Pixel Sprite Studio
description: Draw pixel art with retro palettes (Game Boy, NES, PICO-8), animate across frames, and export PNG, sprite sheets or animated GIF.

title: Flag Analyzer
description: Drop in any flag image and get its dominant colors and percentages, aspect ratio, symmetry scores and a NAVA critique — companion to the Flag Designer.

title: SVG Pattern Generator
description: Design a seamless tileable pattern — dots, stripes, hexagons, waves and more — preview it tiled, then export SVG, CSS or PNG.

title: CRT Effect Lab
description: Apply retro CRT effects — scanlines, curvature, phosphor glow, chromatic aberration — to text or an image, then copy the CSS or export a PNG.

title: Chiptune SFX Lab
description: Design retro 8-bit sound effects — sfxr-style presets, waveform, envelope, slides and bit-crushing — and export a WAV.

title: Flag Look-Alike Finder
description: Design or pick a flag and find its closest real-world matches by color, layout and charges — a similarity score flags "too close" designs.

title: Seating Chart Generator
description: Paste a roster, pick rows, pods or a U-shape, add constraints — keep these two apart, lock her to the front row — and shuffle until the chart works.

title: Probability Lab
description: Run coins, dice, spinners, cards, urns and the birthday paradox — and watch empirical results converge to the exact theory in live charts.

title: Class Timer
description: A big, projector-friendly countdown and stopwatch for timing class activities and transitions.

title: Group Maker
description: Paste a roster and shuffle it into random, balanced groups — by group count or by group size.

title: Function Grapher
description: Plot lines and parabolas and see the slope, intercepts and vertex computed live as you adjust them.

title: Slope Explorer
description: Drag two points on a grid and watch the slope and line equation — slope-intercept and point-slope — update live.

title: Quadratic Explorer
description: See a parabola in standard, vertex and factored form at once, with a live graph and roots/vertex readouts.

title: Systems Explorer
description: Two lines on a graph — see their intersection and the solved system live, including parallel and identical cases.

title: Exponential Explorer
description: y = a·bˣ with live sliders — see growth vs. decay, a table of values, and an optional linear comparison.

title: Inequality Grapher
description: Shade a linear inequality or a system of them and see the solution region update as you edit the inequalities.

title: Stats Explorer
description: Enter a dataset and get mean, median, mode, quartiles, a histogram and a box plot, all computed live.

title: Scatter Plot & Best Fit
description: Plot (x, y) data, fit a least-squares trend line, and read off the correlation coefficient live.

title: Transformations
description: Translate, reflect, rotate and dilate a shape on the coordinate grid and see the transformed vertices live.

title: Right Triangle Explorer
description: Drag the legs of a right triangle and watch a² + b² = c² prove itself with squares drawn on each side.

title: Formula Sheet
description: A searchable high-school math reference — area, volume, coordinate geometry, algebra and finance formulas with worked examples.

title: Number Converter
description: Convert between fractions, decimals and percents in either direction, with automatic simplification.

title: Geometry Toolbox
description: Pick a 2D or 3D shape, enter its dimensions, and get area, perimeter, volume and surface area instantly.

title: Scientific Calculator
description: A full scientific calculator with correct operator precedence, trig/log functions, memory and history.

title: Math Vocab Flashcards
description: Flip through academic math-vocabulary flashcard decks, term to definition and back, shuffle included.

title: Practice Problems
description: Auto-generated arithmetic, integer and equation drills across difficulty levels, with instant answer checking.

title: Core Skills Builder
description: Drill foundational number skills — fraction operations, simplifying, GCF, LCM, order of operations and more.

title: Equation Solver
description: Solve linear and quadratic equations step by step, with every move explained like a patient teacher — and the answer checked at the end.

title: Unit Converter
description: Convert length, area, temperature, running pace and more across 12 categories — including the GIS units nobody remembers.

title: Vacation Selector
description: A short, adaptive survey — each page tailored to your last answers — matches you to travel destinations from a curated set of ~85 places worldwide, with shareable results.

title: Decision Wheel
description: Can't decide? Type your options and spin the wheel — confetti included. Share a link so the group can't blame you.

title: Soccer Tactics Board
description: Set up formations on a scale pitch, drag players, draw movement and passing runs, animate a move across frames, then export or share.

title: Tournament Bracket Builder
description: Build single- or double-elimination brackets or a round-robin league, enter results, and watch standings and the champion emerge. Works for any contest.

title: Shot Map & xG Visualizer
description: Click a pitch to log shots and watch Expected Goals compute live from distance and angle — a shot map plus a cumulative xG race chart.

title: Coordinate Grid Generator
description: Draw lat/long graticules, UTM and MGRS grids over a real map — styled, labeled, and exportable as GeoJSON or a standalone SVG.

title: Map Style Builder
description: Design a map color theme on a live sample city — water, roads, parks, labels — and export a real MapLibre style JSON or theme tokens.

title: Data Cleaning Workbench
description: Stack cleaning steps into a reusable recipe — trim, split, merge, dedupe, normalize — with live before/after preview and an exportable change log.

title: Design Token & Component Previewer
description: Turn 1–3 brand colors into full OKLCH tonal scales, semantic colors and WCAG-checked text pairings — rendered live on real buttons, cards and forms.

title: SVG Icon & Shape Studio
description: Build icons and logos from a shape library with real boolean operations — unite, subtract, intersect — then export optimized SVG or PNG.

title: Responsive Breakpoint Previewer
description: Paste HTML or a URL and see it at seven device widths side by side, with synchronized scrolling and live editing.

title: Procedural Flag Generator
description: Generate plausible new flags from real vexillological grammar — seeded, constrainable, NAVA-scored — and open any result in the Flag Designer.

title: Match Timeline Creator
description: Log goals, cards, subs and VAR drama minute by minute and get a clean match-timeline infographic — export PNG, SVG or a text report.

title: Training Session Planner
description: Drag cones, goals, players and coaching arrows onto a pitch to build multi-drill practice sessions — print clean coaching sheets.

title: League Table What-If Calculator
description: Click W/D/L on remaining fixtures and watch the standings reshuffle live — with every possible finish enumerated for any team.

title: Match Lineup Card Generator
description: Type in your Starting XI and get a shareable lineup graphic in Pitch, List or Broadcast style — sized for social, exported as PNG.
